name: scenarioSimulate
invariants: output.result.options.every(function(o){ return Number.isFinite(o.effectiveLeadTimeDays) && Number.isFinite(o.effectiveUnitCost) && Number.isFinite(o.demandDuringLead) && Number.isFinite(o.projectedStockoutUnits) && Number.isFinite(o.replenishCost) && Number.isFinite(o.daysToStockout); })
output.result.options.every(function(o){ return typeof o.source === 'string' && typeof o.stocksOut === 'boolean'; })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler; reads flat params (SupplyChainPlanner.ScenarioPanel sends flat). REGRESSION-GUARD: altLeadTimeDays default is Math.max(0, …) NOT Math.max(1, …) so an absent alternate source (0) is correctly SKIPPED (the alt is only pushed when altLeadTime > 0) — the prior floor minted a phantom 1-day alternate that always won the ranking (a previously-fixed source bug). Disruption multipliers inflate lead/demand/cost. POISON: scNum collapses garbage to defaults so every option numeric stays FINITE. Component renders options[].source/effectiveLeadTimeDays/effectiveUnitCost/daysToStockout/projectedStockoutUnits/replenishCost/stocksOut + recommendation + resilient. Not assassin-driven; pinned by server/tests/supplychain-lens-macros.test.js.
